corrections.note: The left-margin line number 2 has been absorbed into the body before οἷον.
Printed verse number is 4; transcript has captured the next line number 5 instead.
The parenthetical siglum is ℵc.b, not ℵV.
The lemma ακυρωσαι A | (tot) is omitted before αυθαδης V.

corrections.current: 24—III 1 om κρατει ληθης...εαυτου παθων ο λογισμος ℵ* ηαb
corrections.correct: 24—III 1 om κρατει ληθης...εαυτου παθων ο λογισμος ℵ* ηc.b
corrections.note: The correction hand siglum after ℵ* is c.b, not ηαb; transcript misread the siglum cluster.

corrections.correct: III 1 εστιν V | λογισμος 1°] λογος V
corrections.note: The following variant entry is omitted from the apparatus line.

corrections.current: V | επικρατειν] κρατει ℵc.a επικρατων V
corrections.correct: V | επικρατει] κρατει ℵc.a επικρατων V

corrections.note: The siglum includes the asterisk for the original hand.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but left-margin line numbers have intruded into verse numbering around III 1–4. Apparatus contains several omissions/misread sigla.
